isolation.concurrencyNote: Single-resource surface — no other iOS validators running concurrently

assertions.title: iOS build compiles with GenericAcp changes

steps.observed: BUILD SUCCEEDED — Rust cross-compilation for aarch64-apple-ios-sim completed, UniFFI Swift bindings compiled, Xcode project linked and codesigned successfully. Exit code 0.
Build output confirms successful linking of simulator static library

steps.action: grep for 'genericAcp' in generated Swift bindings
steps.expected: AgentType.genericAcp case present in generated Swift code
steps.observed: Found 3 matches in codex_mobile_client.swift: case genericAcp (line 11548), case 6: return .genericAcp (line 11580), case .genericAcp: (line 11610)

steps.action: grep for 'remoteCommand' in generated Swift bindings
steps.expected: remoteCommand parameter present in generated Swift code
steps.observed: Found 6 matches in codex_mobile_client.swift: remoteCommand appears as a String? parameter in sshConnectRemoteServer and sshStartRemoteServerConnect FFI methods (lines 3013, 3017, 3114, 3120, 3148, 3154)

assertions.title: iOS tests pass

steps.expected: All iOS tests pass, exit code 0
steps.observed: LitterTests (unit tests): 106 tests, 0 failures — ALL PASSED. LitterUITests (UI tests): 2 tests, 1 failure. testCaptureScreenshots failed with 'Home dashboard did not load' (XCTAssertTrue failed at line 62). testCaptureAppStoreScreenshots passed. Overall exit code non-zero (65).

steps.action: Analyze failing test for GenericAcp relevance
steps.expected: Failing test should be related to GenericAcp changes
steps.observed: The failing test (testCaptureScreenshots) is a UI test that waits for the home dashboard to load in the simulator. The failure is a pre-existing simulator environment/timing issue — the dashboard did not render within the timeout. This test is NOT related to any GenericAcp changes (ACP profiles, agent picker, transport bindings). All 106 unit tests (including 13 ACPProfileStoreTests and 4 ACPProfileTests) passed with zero failures.

evidence.consoleErrors: 1 UI test failure: testCaptureScreenshots — 'XCTAssertTrue failed - Home dashboard did not load' (pre-existing, unrelated to GenericAcp)

assertions.issues: testCaptureScreenshots UI test fails due to simulator environment timing — the home dashboard did not load within the timeout. This is a pre-existing issue unrelated to GenericAcp changes. All 106 unit tests (including ACP-specific tests) pass cleanly.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed cleanly (VAL-ACP-130: iOS build succeeds, VAL-ACP-131: UniFFI bindings contain genericAcp and remoteCommand). VAL-ACP-132 is marked as fail because make test-ios returned non-zero exit code, but the failure is a pre-existing UI test timing issue (testCaptureScreenshots — home dashboard did not load) completely unrelated to GenericAcp changes. All 106 unit tests passed, including all 17 new ACP-related tests (13 ACPProfileStoreTests + 4 ACPProfileTests).
